ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

benefit.en: Cash incentive of rupees 5,000 in three installments to pregnant and lactating mothers for the first living child, plus rupees 6,000 if the second child is a girl.
benefit.hi: पहले जीवित बच्चे के लिए गर्भवती व स्तनपान कराने वाली माताओं को 5,000 रुपये की नकद राशि

eligibility_rules_human: Pregnant or lactating woman aged 19 or above, for her first live birth (or second if it is a girl). Government employees of central/state/PSU not eligible. Excludes those already getting comparable cash benefits.
required_documents: Bank or post office account passbook

application_paths.offline_office_pattern: Anganwadi Centre or designated health facility
offline_steps: Register pregnancy at Anganwadi or health facility
Submit Form 1A within 150 days of LMP
Receive 2nd installment (rupees 2,000) after first ANC checkup at 6 months
Receive 3rd installment (rupees 2,000) after birth registration and first immunisation
